case_title: WILLIAM W. VAN WAY VS. EDWARD JEW

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,143.50 FILED BY VAN WAY, WILLIAM W. AS TO DEFENDANT JEW, EDWARD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-30-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR. PERSON WHO WILL APPEAR IN COURT EVELYN JEW (DAUGHTER OF DEFENDANT).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-30-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VAN WAY, WILLIAM W. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JEW, EDWARD $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,125.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
